gist.headline: Science meets sci-fi
gist.blurb: A new community app, SciVis AI, just landed in the greenhouse. It turns any science topic into stunning sci-fi style illustrations using our Flux model.
gist.summary: Added SciVis AI to the community showcase, an app that generates sci-fi style science illustrations using the Pollinations Image API.
gist.impact: Users can now explore and create scientific visualizations in 6 different sci-fi styles and 3 aspect ratios directly from the community apps list.
gist.visual_concept: The PR introduces an app for sci-fi science illustrations. Key symbols: science (atoms, holograms, lab equipment), sci-fi aesthetics, and the Pollinations bee. Polly the bee wearing a tiny lab coat or sci-fi goggles, interacting with a glowing holographic atom or planet.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a futuristic laboratory where a glowing holographic atom floats above a retro computer terminal. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny sci-fi goggles and a lab coat, inspecting the hologram with chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Text in pixel font: 'SCI-VIS'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
